Class SVGNumber.SVGUserUnitValue

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.type.SVGNumber
org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.type.SVGNumber.SVGUserUnitValue
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<SVGNumber>
Enclosing class:
SVGNumber
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: SVGNumber.java 1141 2024-06-23 12:59:01Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.5") public static final class SVGNumber.SVGUserUnitValue extends SVGNumber
An SVG user unit type; usually this is the same as SVGNumber.SVGPixel, but without a unit specifier.
Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Version:
$Id: SVGNumber.java 1141 2024-06-23 12:59:01Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.0.5
